reviews.review_description: 1 star because its so glichy and i cant pick up the toy i hate that this gets 5 stars like to made me lose 5 roller so dum it should be free not wasting your money bro.👎👎👎

I love how you can play as a dog and explore the house. It’s fun jumping on things, making a mess, and trying to escape the man chasing you. The mini games make it even more fun. You can also explore the outside city! AWESOME Game!

developer_response.body: Thank You! We're really happy to hear that.

reviews.review_description: I have my own dog named jesco, and I love playing with him. I’ve always wondered what it would feel like to be a dog. This game is awesome, It still needs a bit of improvement, but the movements and overall feel are already so good it feels just like my own dog. I love the hand watch and the bracelet. Hoping for more updates in the future. Woof Woof 🐶

developer_response.body: We’re really happy the game gave you that “dog’s life” feeling and yes, more updates and improvements are on the way! Glad you liked the watch and bracelet too.

reviews.review_description: WOW, I Played I am cat before, but I'm a DOG PERSON through and through. So this game is PERFECT for me! Love the unique features, especially the freedom to just run wild! Hoping for a MULTIPlAYER update soon. would love to play this with my son!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! Really glad you’re enjoying the game.
And yes, we’re working on more features, including multiplayer so you can play with your friends and family!

reviews.review_description: I love the idea of this game! It’s still in early development, so there are some rough edges, but you can tell the team really cares. As a fan of pet games, I’m super excited about the direction it’s going in. The recent update looks promising—can’t wait to see what’s next!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We're really glad you’re enjoying the concept. In the next update, we’re introducing a funnier and more interactive owner, new pet tricks, cozy interior redesigns, and overall improvements to make Dog’s Day Out even more fun and immersive!

reviews.review_description: The game has many things you can do like when you touch the watch it gives details about you. Also you can play different games and watch tv. You can purchase accessories from the shop. If you're thinking of getting this game I recommend playing it is very fun and I hope you have fun playing too.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! We're really happy to hear that you’re having a good time playing the game.

reviews.review_title: I LOVEEEEE THISSSS GAME! MUST TRY
reviews.review_description:
I used to play I Am Cat a lot but I’m absolutely LOVING this game! Finally, I get to play as my cute dog. it’s just so much fun running around and causing chaos in the house. The animations and interactions are adorable!

I am SUPER excited for the new update,  being able to explore the outside city sounds amazing!!!! And the fact that I’ll get to raise my puppy makes it even better. Can’t wait to see whats next, this game just keeps getting BETTER!!!!

reviews.review_title: Pure fun from start to end
reviews.review_description: I love this game. Its one of the best game so far, the mini games make it even more fun to play. I hope we get more exciting updates soon.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your amazing feedback!  We’re glad you enjoyed the game. Our team is working on even more exciting updates stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: This game was exactly what i wanted. The mini games the shop everything is perfect. Amazing experience!
